calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Janet Pond

Petitioner Amal Ahmad Ghossein present in pro per, was sworn and examined.

The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Molly Amal Ghossein.

Decree signed in open court.
